meaning: adj.粉碎性的,猛烈的,了不起的
examples: Gastroliths make food easier to digest, essentially smashing food up, just as we do when we chew.
Believe me, we hobgoblins did our share of mischief—unhinging gates, smashing pumpkins, soaping the library windows with cartoon demons.
But 40-year-old Brown led the revival, smashing 42 from 46 balls before he was lbw to Sean Ervine.
Smashing cereal into the office carpet, he would unleash the Roomba on the mess.
